member.name: T:Maliev.CountryService.Api.Controllers.AdminCountriesController
member.summary: Administrative endpoints for managing country data (CRUD operations). Requires authentication and role-based authorization. Most operations require CountryAdmin role, hard delete requires SuperAdmin. All modifications are logged with full audit trail including user context and ETag-based optimistic concurrency control.

member.name: M:Maliev.CountryService.Api.Controllers.AdminCountriesController.#ctor(Maliev.CountryService.Api.Services.ICountryService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Maliev.CountryService.Api.Controllers.AdminCountriesController},Maliev.CountryService.Api.Metrics.BusinessMetrics)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Maliev.CountryService.Api.Controllers.AdminCountriesController.Create(Maliev.CountryService.Api.Models.Countries.CreateCountryRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new country with complete geographical and metadata information. Returns the created country with Location header pointing to the resource and ETag for future updates.
member.param: Country creation request with all required fields (ISO2, ISO3, Name) and optional metadata.
member.returns: The created country with generated ID and ETag.
member.response: Country created successfully with Location and ETag headers.
Validation failed - missing or invalid required fields.
Conflict - ISO2 or ISO3 code already exists for another country.

member.name: M:Maliev.CountryService.Api.Controllers.AdminCountriesController.Update(System.Int64,Maliev.CountryService.Api.Models.Countries.UpdateCountryRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs a full update (replacement) of an existing country. Requires If-Match header with current ETag to prevent lost updates (optimistic concurrency control). All fields in the request will replace the existing values.
member.param: The unique database ID of the country to update.
member.returns: The updated country with new ETag.
member.response: Country updated successfully with new ETag header.
Validation failed.
Country not found.
Conflict - ISO code already exists for another country.
Precondition failed - ETag mismatch, country was modified by another user.
Precondition required - If-Match header is missing.

member.name: M:Maliev.CountryService.Api.Controllers.AdminCountriesController.Patch(System.Int64,Maliev.CountryService.Api.Models.Countries.PatchCountryRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs a partial update of an existing country, modifying only the specified fields. Requires If-Match header with current ETag for concurrency control. At least one field must be provided in the request.
member.param: The unique database ID of the country to update.
Partial country data - only provided fields will be updated.
member.returns: The updated country with new ETag.
member.response: Country updated successfully with new ETag header.
Validation failed or no fields provided.
Country not found.
Conflict - ISO code already exists for another country.
Precondition failed - ETag mismatch.
Precondition required - If-Match header is missing.

member.name: M:Maliev.CountryService.Api.Controllers.AdminCountriesController.SoftDelete(System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft deletes a country by setting its IsActive flag to false. The country data is preserved for audit and historical purposes but will not appear in normal queries. Can be reversed by updating the IsActive flag back to true.
member.param: The unique database ID of the country to soft delete.
member.returns: No content on success.
member.response: Country soft deleted successfully.
Country not found.

member.name: M:Maliev.CountryService.Api.Controllers.AdminCountriesController.HardDelete(System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Permanently deletes a country from the database. This operation cannot be undone and will remove all associated data. Requires SuperAdmin role. Use with extreme caution - prefer soft delete for most cases.
member.param: The unique database ID of the country to permanently delete.
member.returns: No content on success.
member.response: Country permanently deleted.
Country not found.

member.name: M:Maliev.CountryService.Api.Controllers.AdminCountriesController.Restore(System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Restores a soft-deleted country. Sets IsActive to true and removes DeletedAt timestamp.
member.param: The ID of the country to restore.
member.returns: No content on success.
member.response: Country restored successfully.
Country not found.

member.name: M:Maliev.CountryService.Api.Controllers.AdminCountriesController.RebuildCache(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Rebuilds the country cache from database.

member.name: M:Maliev.CountryService.Api.Controllers.AdminCountriesController.ExportAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exports all country data as JSON.

member.name: M:Maliev.CountryService.Api.Controllers.AdminCountriesController.GetUserId
member.summary: Extracts the user identifier from JWT token claims for audit logging. Tries multiple claim types in order: 'sub', 'email', Identity.Name, or returns 'anonymous' if none found.
member.returns: The user identifier string.

member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
member.returns: The normalized documentation comment ID.
